top.name: Time Walk
top.rules_text: Choose a target tile within range 3. At the end of each of the next 3 turns deal 4 damage to whatever unit is on that tile.

channel.name: Time Walk (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also slow the target each time

bottom.name: Chrono Anchor Field
bottom.rules_text: Imbue 3 tiles in range 2: enemies that enter are slowed and their next spell is delayed 1 turn.

channel.name: Chrono Anchor Field (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Field lasts 3 turns instead of 2
